elements.title: sobaity seabream
elements.contents: ... that the sobaity seabream (example pictured) is reserved for special occasions in the Persian Gulf region?

elements.title: Éric Bernard
elements.contents: ... that actor Éric Bernard was advised not to hold hands with his husband at the Cannes Film Festival to avoid damaging possible roles as a straight man?

elements.title: Punisher skull
elements.contents: ... that the Punisher skull has been adopted as an unofficial emblem by real-world police departments and far-right activists?

elements.title: Constantinianus
elements.contents: ... that Constantinianus, a trusted adviser to Emperor Justinian I, investigated plots against him even from suspected relatives?

elements.title: POLR3-related leukodystrophy
elements.contents: ... that five different disorders have been identified as forms of POLR3-related leukodystrophy?

elements.title: Benjamin Karim
elements.contents: ... that Benjamin Karim introduced Malcolm X at the event at which he was assassinated?

elements.title: Ummi
elements.contents: ... that the Indonesian women's magazine Ummi dealt with issues such as dress, food, jewellery, contraceptives, and accepting sons' jihad?

elements.title: Will Play on the Beat
elements.contents: ... that "Will Play on the Beat" is the only Pakistan Super League anthem to have no opening ceremony?

elements.title: a fictional moving statue
elements.contents: ... that fans of a fictional moving statue have nicknamed it "Peanut"?
